name: Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc.
business: Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc. is a sustainability-oriented consumer products company that creates and curates natural, high-performance brands and products for home care, health and wellness, beauty, and personal care. The company sells primarily through a direct-to-consumer (DTC) website and mobile application, and also offers third-party brands. Grove is a public benefit corporation and Certified B Corporation.

exposures.sentence: Grove builds natural products that perform as well as or better than many leading consumer packaged goods (CPG) brands (both conventional and natural), while being healthier for consumers and the planet.

We operate an online direct-to-consumer website and mobile application (DTC platform) where we both sell our Grove-owned brands (Grove Brands) and partner with other leading natural and mission-based CPG brands.

catalysts.event: Launch of Green Rewards customer loyalty program
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we launched our Green Rewards customer loyalty program, which enables our customers to earn a rewards balance from purchases and other activities that these customers can apply to future purchases.

catalysts.event: Third amendment to Siena Revolver extending maturity to April 10, 2028
catalysts.sentence: On May 8, 2025, the Company entered into a third amendment to the Siena Revolver which, among other things, extended the maturity date of the Siena Revolver to April 10, 2028 and eliminated the financial covenant applicable to the Siena Revolver.

catalysts.event: Amendment to SEPA extending term to August 1, 2027
catalysts.sentence: On July 8, 2025, we and Yorkville amended the SEPA (the Amended SEPA ) to extend the term to August 1, 2027 and amend the purchase price of any shares sold under the Amended SEPA.
Our next recertification will occur in 2027.
